title: News: 2025 Q4
description: 10 questions about major events from October to December 2025

questions.question: What annual UN climate conference (COP) was held in late 2025?
questions.explanation: COP30 was held in Belém, Brazil in November 2025, focusing on climate action and deforestation.

questions.question: Where was COP30 held in 2025?
questions.explanation: COP30 was hosted in Belém, Brazil, in the heart of the Amazon region.

questions.question: Which country was scheduled to host the 2026 FIFA World Cup, generating significant preparations in late 2025?
questions.explanation: The 2026 FIFA World Cup, to be hosted jointly by the US, Canada, and Mexico, drove major preparations in late 2025.

questions.question: What was a major concern for the global economy in Q4 2025?
options: Ongoing trade war effects and tariff uncertainty
questions.explanation: The economic effects of the US-initiated trade war and tariff policies continued to create global economic uncertainty.

questions.question: Which tech trend dominated headlines toward the end of 2025?
options: AI agents and autonomous AI systems
questions.explanation: AI agents capable of performing complex tasks autonomously became a dominant trend in tech toward the end of 2025.

questions.question: What milestone did global EV sales approach by the end of 2025?
questions.explanation: Global electric vehicle sales continued their rapid growth, approaching 20 million units annually by end of 2025.

questions.question: Which ongoing conflict continued to affect global energy and food markets through the end of 2025?
questions.explanation: The Russia-Ukraine war continued to impact global energy and food supply chains through 2025.

questions.question: What was a significant development in the US-China relationship in late 2025?
options: Continued trade negotiations amid high tariffs
questions.explanation: The US and China continued tense trade negotiations amid historically high tariff levels in late 2025.

questions.question: Which social media platform continued to grow rapidly as an alternative to X (formerly Twitter) in 2025?
questions.explanation: Bluesky saw continued rapid user growth throughout 2025 as users sought alternatives to X.

questions.question: What major astronomical event occurred in 2025 that was visible from parts of the world?
options: Lunar eclipse and rare planetary alignment
questions.explanation: 2025 featured notable lunar eclipses and planetary alignments visible from various parts of the world.
